content.text: Apply bugfix-1: Implemented store-scoped data isolation, NFC attendance support, KPI-backed analytics data, and added coverage for key risk areas.

Implemented store-scoped data isolation, NFC attendance support, KPI-backed analytics data, and added coverage for key risk areas.

Changes applied:
### Multi-store isolation
- Added store_id columns across user, member, inventory, training, and attendance tables.
- Scoped inventory, training, loyalty, and attendance queries by current user's store_id.
- Updated auth/session payloads to include store_id for downstream scoping.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/db/models/system.py, fullstack/backend/app/db/models/loyalty.py, fullstack/backend/app/db/models/ops_training.py, fullstack/backend/app/db/models/attendance.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/inventory_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/training_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/attendance_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/loyalty_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/inventory.py, fullstack/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/training.py, fullstack/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/attendance.py, fullstack/backend/app/schemas/auth.py, fullstack/frontend/src/services/auth.ts

### Attendance NFC support
- Added NFC badge bindings and optional NFC tag auth for check-in/out.
- Persisted NFC badge linkage for reuse and validation.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/db/models/attendance.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/attendance_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/schemas/attendance.py, fullstack/frontend/src/services/attendance.ts

### Analytics data integrity
- Replaced synthetic analytics rows with KPI materialization data from kpi_daily_metrics.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/services/analytics_service.py

### Database migration
- Added migration for store_id columns and NFC badge tables/fields.
Files: fullstack/backend/alembic/versions/20260327_0008_store_scoping_nfc.py

Tests added:
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_inventory_workflow.py::test_inventory_store_isolation
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_attendance_flow.py::test_attendance_nfc_checkin_checkout_creates_badge
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_ops_kpi.py::test_dashboard_data_uses_kpi_metrics
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_auth_security.py::test_member_store_isolation
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_training_flow.py::test_training_store_isolation
- fullstack/frontend/src/services/attendance.spec.ts::submits nfc checkin checkout
- fullstack/frontend/src/services/auth.spec.ts::auth service
